moments.title: FIFA World Cup Group Stage Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage is in full swing, with Match Day 2 concluding and Match Day 3 kicking off this week, featuring key fixtures across North America.

angles.name: General Buzz
angles.copy: World Cup fever is gripping the globe! Which game are you most looking forward to this week as the group stages heat up? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: England Match
angles.copy: England are in action this Saturday (June 27) against Panama in the FIFA World Cup group stage. Can the Three Lions secure their spot in the knockouts? #ThreeLions

moments.title: Summer Solstice - Longest Day
moments.blurb: Today, Sunday June 21, marks the Summer Solstice in the Northern Hemisphere, bringing the longest day and shortest night of the year, officially at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: General
angles.copy: Happy Summer Solstice! Today is the longest day of 2026. How are you making the most of all that extra daylight? #SummerSolstice

angles.name: Stonehenge
angles.copy: Thousands gathered at Stonehenge this morning to witness the sunrise on the Summer Solstice. English Heritage even livestreamed it for those who couldn't make it! #Stonehenge

moments.title: Taylor Swift Holds UK Singles Chart #1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' secures its second week at #1 on the Official Singles Chart for June 18-24, 2026, marking her seventh chart-topper.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Taylor Swift reigns supreme! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is #1 on the Official Singles Chart for a second week. Are you streaming it non-stop? #TaylorSwift

angles.name: Swifties
angles.copy: That's seven UK Number 1s for Taylor Swift! The Swifties are out in force keeping 'I Knew It, I Knew You' at the top. What's your favourite Taylor track? #Swifties

moments.title: Olivia Rodrigo, K-Pop Supergroup Debut High on UK Chart
moments.blurb: Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' enters the Official Singles Chart at #2, while K-Pop collaboration 'ICONIC BY MISTAKE' by LE SSERAFIM, ILLIT, and KATSEYE debuts at #22.

angles.name: Olivia Rodrigo
angles.copy: New music alert! Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' has burst onto the UK Singles Chart at an impressive #2. Are you loving her latest? #OliviaRodrigo

angles.name: K-Pop Chart Success
angles.copy: Major K-Pop news! LE SSERAFIM, ILLIT, and KATSEYE's 'ICONIC BY MISTAKE' makes a huge debut at #22 on the Official Singles Chart – a first Top 40 for LE SSERAFIM and ILLIT! #KPop

moments.title: Ray Davies of The Kinks Turns 82
moments.blurb: Legendary Kinks frontman Ray Davies celebrates his 82nd birthday today, June 21.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 82nd Birthday to the iconic Ray Davies of The Kinks! What's your favourite Kinks track? #RayDavies #TheKinks

moments.title: Lana Del Rey Celebrates 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey turns 41 today, June 21.

angles.name: Birthday Message
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Lana Del Rey, who turns 41 today! Which of her dreamy tracks is your favourite? #LanaDelRey

moments.title: The Killers' Brandon Flowers Turns 45
moments.blurb: Happy 45th birthday to Brandon Flowers, the charismatic frontman of The Killers, born June 21.

angles.name: Birthday Rock
angles.copy: It's Brandon Flowers' 45th birthday today! The Killers' frontman still knows how to light up a stage. What's your go-to Killers anthem? #BrandonFlowers #TheKillers

moments.title: Isle of Wight & TRNSMT Festivals Conclude
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival and Glasgow's TRNSMT Festival both wrap up today, June 21, after a weekend of incredible live music.

angles.name: Festival Wrap-Up
angles.copy: It's a festival wrap! Both Isle of Wight and TRNSMT finish today after a massive weekend of music. Who did you see, or who was on your must-see list? #IOW2026 #TRNSMT2026

moments.title: 'The Agency' Season 2 Premieres on Paramount+
moments.blurb: The second season of the political thriller 'The Agency', starring Michael Fassbender, launches today, June 21, on Paramount+.

angles.name: TV Watch
angles.copy: Get ready for more espionage! Michael Fassbender returns in 'The Agency' Season 2, premiering today on Paramount+. Will you be tuning in? #TheAgency

moments.title: Love Island Season 13 Heats Up ITV2
moments.blurb: The 13th series of 'Love Island', hosted by Maya Jama, is currently airing on ITV2, bringing daily drama from the villa.

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: The villa is buzzing! Are you keeping up with all the twists and turns in Love Island Season 13 on ITV2? #LoveIsland

moments.title: Todd Rundgren Turns 78
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, June 22, marks the 78th birthday of influential musician, songwriter, and producer Todd Rundgren.

angles.name: Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday to the incredible Todd Rundgren tomorrow! A true pioneer in rock and pop. What's your favourite of his many hits? #ToddRundgren

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper Celebrates 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic '80s pop star Cyndi Lauper will celebrate her 73rd birthday tomorrow, June 22.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Girls (and guys) just wanna have fun! Tomorrow we celebrate the 73rd birthday of the legendary Cyndi Lauper. Which of her anthems still gets you dancing? #CyndiLauper

moments.title: 'A Woman of Substance' Adaptation on BritBox
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of Barbara Taylor Bradford's 'A Woman of Substance', starring Jessica Reynolds and Brenda Blethyn, premieres on BritBox on June 24.

angles.name: Period Drama
angles.copy: A new epic period drama is coming! 'A Woman of Substance' starts on BritBox this Wednesday (June 24). Will you be watching Emma Harte's extraordinary journey? #AWomanOfSubstance

moments.title: Morvala Festival Kicks Off in Cornwall
moments.blurb: The Morvala Music Festival, featuring acts like Embrace, Hawkwind, and The Feeling, begins its four-day run in Mount Edgcumbe, Cornwall, on June 25.

angles.name: Cornwall Festival
angles.copy: Cornwall, get ready! The Morvala Festival starts this Wednesday (June 25) with a fantastic line-up including Embrace, Hawkwind, and The Feeling. Who are you excited to see? #MorvalaFestival

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Wednesday, June 26.

angles.name: Pop Princess Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande this Wednesday! What's your ultimate Ariana track? #ArianaGrande

moments.title: The Clash's Mick Jones Turns 71
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, legendary guitarist and songwriter for The Clash and Big Audio Dynamite, will celebrate his 71st birthday on Wednesday, June 26.

angles.name: Punk Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 71st Birthday to punk icon Mick Jones of The Clash and Big Audio Dynamite this Wednesday! The man who gave us 'London Calling' and so much more. #MickJones #TheClash

moments.title: Beach Boys' Bruce Johnston Turns 84
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, long-standing member of The Beach Boys, will celebrate his 84th birthday on Thursday, June 27.

angles.name: Surf Rock Legend
angles.copy: Good vibrations for Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys, who turns 84 this Thursday! What's your favourite Beach Boys classic? #BeachBoys #BruceJohnston

moments.title: Scotland World Cup Anthem Enters UK Chart
moments.blurb: Nick Morgan's unofficial Scotland World Cup anthem, 'No Scotland, No Party', is set to make its debut on the Official Singles Chart at #32, revived for their 2026 participation.

angles.name: Scotland Anthem
angles.copy: Up the Tartan Army! 'No Scotland, No Party' is charging up the UK charts at #32, thanks to the World Cup buzz. Are you blasting this one? #Scotland #WorldCup2026

moments.title: Beyond Paradise S4 Airs on BritBox
moments.blurb: The fourth season of the popular 'Death in Paradise' spin-off, 'Beyond Paradise', starring Kris Marshall, is currently streaming on BritBox.

angles.name: Cozy Crime
angles.copy: DI Humphrey Goodman is back! Season 4 of 'Beyond Paradise' is out now on BritBox. Who's already binged the new series? #BeyondParadise
